cit.basis: Flat 20% corporate profit tax on the taxable profit of resident legal entities (Tax Code of the Republic of Azerbaijan).
cit.note: Administered by the State Tax Service under the Ministry of Economy.

vat.note: 18% VAT on taxable supplies of goods and services and on imports; a zero rate and exemptions apply to specified categories.

simplified_tax.note: Small businesses below the VAT registration threshold may opt into a simplified turnover-based regime (a percentage of gross receipts) in lieu of profit tax and VAT. Rates and eligibility vary; out of scope for this profit-tax estimator.

personal_income_tax.note: Progressive/flat employment income taxation with regime-specific exemptions; not modelled here.

official_sources.name: State Tax Service of the Republic of Azerbaijan

metadata.caveat: AI-estimated: rates and rules in this pack were generated by an AI system and have NOT been verified against primary legislation. Treat as an unverified estimate and confirm every figure against the State Tax Service (https://www.taxes.gov.az/) and a local advisor before any filing or production use.

effective_date_range.basis: Target ruleset/params year; jurisdiction fiscal calendars and transitional periods may differ.

rate_threshold_assumptions: Rates and thresholds are simplified for LedgerField estimates.
Simplified turnover regimes, sector rules, WHT, relief, and filing obligations may alter outcomes.
Verify against official guidance and a local advisor before filing or production use.
limitations: Not legal, tax, accounting, or filing advice.
Does not encode every deduction, exemption, treaty, WHT, payroll, or filing rule.
High-stakes use requires local validation against official forms and current law.
